title: Another. (Virgin Mary)
content:
As sunbeams pierce the glass, and streaming in,
    No crack or schism leave i' th' subtle skin:
    So the Divine Hand worked and brake no thread,
    But, in a mother, kept a maidenhead.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Another. (Virgin Mary)", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
